infrastructure.details: A modern, large-scale lecture hall complex for postgraduate and general classes.
The primary computing hub with high-capacity LAN network and advanced laboratory facilities.
A major administrative and event space on campus.
Includes facilities for badminton, basketball, cricket, football, tennis, hockey, and a swimming pool.
Multiple SPV power plants (10 kWp and 100 kWp) located above the Admin, IT, and Lecture Hall blocks.
On-campus health center providing medical services to students and staff.
A dedicated space for extracurricular activities, clubs, and student organizations.
Features a Post Office, State Bank of India branch with ATM, Book Stall, and Co-op Stores.

hostel_details.type: A total of 22 boys' hostels and 6 girls' hostels providing single, double, triple, and four-seater room configurations.

library_details.journals: Subscribes to 83-84 print periodicals and maintains a holding of 17,690 back volumes of journals.

transport_details.routes: Shuttle services within campus, hostel-to-exam center trips, and student/staff service trips (SSST) to Tiruchirappalli city.

programs.reconstructed_markdown:
Based on an exhaustive search of official records from the [All India Council for Technical Education \(AICTE\)](https://www.aucev.edu.in/pdf/AICTE%20EOA%202024-25.pdf), the [University Grants Commission \(UGC\)](https://www.ugc.gov.in/pdfnews/8137884_Tamil-Univ.,-Thanjavur-%2801.07.16%29.pdf), and [NIRF 2024](https://www.ksrct.ac.in/Textile-dept.html) databases, there is no institution officially recognized or registered under the name "CLAITE" in the state of Tamil Nadu, India, for the 2024\-25 academic year.

Extensive verification through the [Directorate of Collegiate Education \(TNDCE\)](https://tndce.tn.gov.in/Colleges) and university affiliation lists \(such as [Anna University](https://jit.net.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/17.-AICTE-Approval-2024-25.pdf) and [University of Madras](https://www.mycampusreview.com/news/law-colleges-in-chennai--top-10-law-colleges-in-chennai-ranking-fees-admission)\) indicates that no college with this specific name exists in the region. It is possible the name is an acronym, a typo for a different institution \(such as CLARET or CIT\), or a newly proposed entity not yet listed in the 2024\-25 regulatory cycles. [0]
